2175930.name: Manafinder Soundtrack
2175930.description:
The Manafinder soundtrack includes all 74 tracks used in the game, plus the three trailer songs that are not actually used within the game!

The soundtrack was composed by Nestor Ovilla (Crab Sound) and recorded as the game was developed from 2017 to 2022. Inspired greatly by a wide variety of classic RPGs while also including his original touch.
